requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) and radio aspects — CISPR/IEC EMC and ARCOTEL for any radio module
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）及无线电方面——CISPR/IEC EMC及任何无线电模块的ARCOTEL
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）及無線電方面——CISPR/IEC EMC及任何無線電模組的ARCOTEL

summary.en: Where electromagnetic compatibility is regulated for household appliances in Ecuador, conformity is demonstrated against NTE INEN standards adopting the CISPR/IEC EMC framework — CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household appliances and similar apparatus — as part of the applicable RTE INEN / Certificate of Conformity, rather than a standalone EMC directive. Plain-vanilla refrigerators (compressor, lighting, controls) are conventional appliances and the EMC aspect is handled within appliance certification. If a refrigerator includes a radio module (e.g. Wi-Fi/Bluetooth for a smart/connected model), the radio function additionally falls under telecommunications/radio regulation administered by ARCOTEL (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones), which requires a homologacion (type approval/homologation) of the radio equipment before it can be lawfully imported and operated. Spanish documentation applies.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔对家用电器规范电磁兼容之处，符合性依据采用CISPR/IEC EMC框架的NTE INEN标准证明——家用电器及类似器具的CISPR 14-1（发射）及CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）——作为适用RTE INEN/合格证书的一部分，而非独立的EMC指令。普通冰箱（压缩机、照明、控制）为常规器具，EMC方面在器具认证内处理。若冰箱含无线电模块（如智能/联网型号的Wi-Fi/蓝牙），无线电功能另受由ARCOTEL（电信监管与控制局）管理的电信/无线电法规约束，须在合法进口及使用前对无线电设备办理homologacion（型式核准/认证）。适用西班牙文文件。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多爾對家用電器規範電磁相容之處，符合性依據採用CISPR/IEC EMC框架的NTE INEN標準證明——家用電器及類似器具的CISPR 14-1（發射）及CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）——作為適用RTE INEN/合格證書的一部分，而非獨立的EMC指令。普通冰箱（壓縮機、照明、控制）為常規器具，EMC方面在器具認證內處理。若冰箱含無線電模組（如智能/聯網型號的Wi-Fi/藍牙），無線電功能另受由ARCOTEL（電信監管與控制局）管理的電信/無線電法規約束，須在合法進口及使用前對無線電設備辦理homologacion（型式核准/認證）。適用西班牙文文件。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN adopting CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 — EMC emission and immunity for household appliances (within the RTE INEN / Certificate of Conformity, where EMC is regulated)
ARCOTEL (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones) — homologacion (type approval) of any radio module in a connected/smart refrigerator
Spanish-language EMC/radio documentation in the technical file held by the importer

summary.en: In China, EMC for household refrigerators is mandatory and demonstrated through CCC, which references GB 4343.1 (emission, aligned with CISPR 14-1) and GB 4343.2 / GB 17625 series (immunity and harmonics, aligned with CISPR 14-2 / IEC 61000-3 series). For any radio module, China requires a radio-transmission-equipment Type Approval (SRRC, State Radio Regulation Committee) plus CCC and telecom equipment access licensing. These Chinese approvals (CCC EMC, SRRC) are domestic and are not recognized by Ecuador's INEN or ARCOTEL; the EMC test data may be technically comparable (same CISPR basis) but must be re-presented in the Ecuadorian conformity route, and any radio module requires separate ARCOTEL homologation.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱的EMC为强制性，通过CCC证明，引用GB 4343.1（发射，与CISPR 14-1对齐）及GB 4343.2/GB 17625系列（抗扰度及谐波，与CISPR 14-2/IEC 61000-3系列对齐）。对任何无线电模块，中国要求无线电发射设备型号核准（SRRC，国家无线电管理委员会）加CCC及电信设备进网许可。这些中国批准（CCC EMC、SRRC）属国内批准，不被厄瓜多尔INEN或ARCOTEL认可；EMC测试数据在技术上或可比（同为CISPR基础），但须在厄瓜多尔符合性途径中重新呈现，任何无线电模块须另办ARCOTEL homologacion。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱的EMC為強制性，通過CCC證明，引用GB 4343.1（發射，與CISPR 14-1對齊）及GB 4343.2/GB 17625系列（抗擾度及諧波，與CISPR 14-2/IEC 61000-3系列對齊）。對任何無線電模組，中國要求無線電發射設備型號核准（SRRC，國家無線電管理委員會）加CCC及電信設備進網許可。這些中國批准（CCC EMC、SRRC）屬國內批准，不被厄瓜多爾INEN或ARCOTEL認可；EMC測試數據在技術上或可比（同為CISPR基礎），但須在厄瓜多爾符合性途徑中重新呈現，任何無線電模組須另辦ARCOTEL homologacion。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 (aligned with CISPR 14-1) / GB 4343.2 (aligned with CISPR 14-2) / GB 17625 series — EMC emission, immunity and harmonics for household appliances in China (via CCC)
SRRC Type Approval + telecom equipment network-access license — required for any radio module in a connected refrigerator in China

gap.en: Two gaps. (1) Recognition of EMC evidence: although China's GB 4343.1/4343.2 and Ecuador's NTE INEN both derive from the CISPR 14 series, the Chinese CCC EMC certification is not recognized in Ecuador. Where EMC is part of the applicable RTE INEN, the evidence must be re-presented in the Certificate-of-Conformity technical file; the common CISPR basis usually makes the EMC test data reusable subject to the certifying body's acceptance, which should be confirmed. (2) Radio module homologation: a connected/smart refrigerator with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth needs ARCOTEL homologation in Ecuador — the Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. A plain refrigerator without a radio module avoids the ARCOTEL step entirely. Exporters should determine early whether the model carries a radio module, because that single factor adds a distinct telecom-regulator approval on top of the appliance certification.
gap.zh: 两个差距。（1）EMC证据认可：尽管中国GB 4343.1/4343.2与厄瓜多尔NTE INEN均源自CISPR 14系列，中国CCC EMC认证在厄瓜多尔不被认可。在EMC属于适用RTE INEN之处，证据须在合格证书技术文件内重新呈现；共同的CISPR基础通常使EMC测试数据可复用，但须经认证机构接受并予确认。（2）无线电模块认证：带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的联网/智能冰箱在厄瓜多尔需ARCOTEL homologacion——中国SRRC核准不可移植。无无线电模块的普通冰箱可完全免去ARCOTEL步骤。出口商应尽早确定型号是否含无线电模块，因为这一单一因素会在器具认证之上增加一项独立的电信监管批准。
gap.zht: 兩個差距。（1）EMC證據認可：儘管中國GB 4343.1/4343.2與厄瓜多爾NTE INEN均源自CISPR 14系列，中國CCC EMC認證在厄瓜多爾不被認可。在EMC屬於適用RTE INEN之處，證據須在合格證書技術文件內重新呈現；共同的CISPR基礎通常使EMC測試數據可復用，但須經認證機構接受並予確認。（2）無線電模組認證：帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的聯網/智能冰箱在厄瓜多爾需ARCOTEL homologacion——中國SRRC核准不可移植。無無線電模組的普通冰箱可完全免去ARCOTEL步驟。出口商應盡早確定型號是否含無線電模組，因為這一單一因素會在器具認證之上增加一項獨立的電信監管批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — EMC (CISPR 14-1/14-2 via NTE INEN) within the RTE INEN / Certificate of Conformity; ARCOTEL homologation additionally mandatory if the refrigerator contains a radio module (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC via CCC (GB 4343.1/4343.2); SRRC Type Approval + network-access license required for any radio module in China

source.publisher: ARCOTEL — Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones (Ecuador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for refrigerators is handled through NTE INEN CISPR 14 standards within the RTE INEN / Certificate of Conformity; the common CISPR basis with China's GB 4343 series usually makes test data reusable subject to the certifier's acceptance, but the Chinese CCC EMC approval is not recognized. A connected refrigerator with a radio module additionally needs ARCOTEL homologation, which the Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱的EMC通过RTE INEN/合格证书内的NTE INEN CISPR 14标准处理；与中国GB 4343系列共同的CISPR基础通常使测试数据可复用（须经认证方接受），但中国CCC EMC批准不被认可。带无线电模块的联网冰箱另需ARCOTEL homologacion，中国SRRC核准不满足该要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱的EMC通過RTE INEN/合格證書內的NTE INEN CISPR 14標準處理；與中國GB 4343系列共同的CISPR基礎通常使測試數據可復用（須經認證方接受），但中國CCC EMC批准不被認可。帶無線電模組的聯網冰箱另需ARCOTEL homologacion，中國SRRC核准不滿足該要求。
